content: agent1: implementing TTL support for cache in dspy/clients/cache.py and dspy/clients/__init__.py (configure_cache, Cache class, set_ttl helper). Let me know if you're touching these files.

agent1: ack, we do overlap on Cache constructor. I'll add ttl: Optional[int]=None as a new param (not touching disk_cache_dir/size params), and add set_ttl() + ttl passthrough in configure_cache. Should merge fine with additive params from both sides. I'll push soon.

agent1: pushed my TTL changes to team/agent1 (commit 54208051). Cache.__init__ now takes ttl as a new trailing positional-capable kwarg param after memory_max_entries; configure_cache/DSPY_CACHE updated accordingly. Let me know when your branch is ready so I can merge.
